# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This is an educational companion for product managers. Read and follow the repository-root `AGENTS.md` before guiding a reader or changing files. Use `COMPANION_MAP.md` to choose the bounded path, then open the matching `companion/chapters/NN.md` guide. Lead with its product question and visible artifact; offer Python, SQLite, or shell checks only as optional verification after the reader understands the artifact.
